aligned_lyrics.text: Scratching at that pale blue sky
It’s just the two of us tonight
Like you never really left me
I breathe you in once more
I wrap your ghost around my shoulders
Makes the whole world blink and sway
Like you never really left me
I breathe you in once more
I wrap your ghost around my shoulders
Back when silence felt like spring
Like you never really left me
I breathe you in once more
I wrap your ghost around my shoulders
